name: Mother Spider Splitter
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>分</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>裂</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>するマザー・スパイダー
desc: If you control no monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can Tribute this card; you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Xyz Monsters, also Special Summon up to 3 "Baby Spider" from your hand and/or Deck, and if you do, they become Level 5, but cannot be used as material for an Xyz Summon, except the Xyz Summon of a DARK monster. You can only use this effect of "Mother Spider Splitter" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control no monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can Tribute this card; you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Xyz Monsters, also Special Summon up to 3 "Baby Spider" from your hand and/or Deck, and if you do, they become Level 5, but cannot be used as material for an Xyz Summon, except the Xyz Summon of a DARK monster. You can only use this effect of "Mother Spider Splitter" once per turn.
eff: If you control no monsters, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can Tribute this card; you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Xyz Monsters, also Special Summon up to 3 "Baby Spider" from your hand and/or Deck, and if you do, they become Level 5, but cannot be used as material for an Xyz Summon, except the Xyz Summon of a DARK monster. You can only use this effect of "Mother Spider Splitter" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Cannot be used as an Xyz Material
